name: bug_window_size_ignored
description: B2: E2eSetup.window_width / window_height must reach the headless window. The setup below asks for 800x900; the root box is sized to 100% of the window, so its laid-out size IS the window size. If the window is stuck at the 640x480 default, this test goes red.

css: html, body { margin: 0; padding: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; }
